text.message: Who thought nobody would trade anything
i mean you asked for wood after blocking it
But oj unnecessarily did that. Just to kill my game
He didn’t need that at all
he made my game sufferable too
Yeah may be he is an expert
People like you deserve credit for that
But its difficult to play on a selfish board where nobody trades
Oh god. He plowed all of us
the good vs yhe bad guy
Its not connected with the plows. Its who leading
Nice game black. Wish you can win
We may ha te oj but not kingmaker
